mapper.select: SELECT EMAIL , NAME , PASSWORD FROM SPRING_BOOT.MEMBERS

SELECT EMAIL , NAME , PASSWORD , SALT , TO_CHAR(REGIST_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REGIST_DATE , TO_CHAR(MODIFY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MODIFY_DATE , TO_CHAR(LATEST_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LATEST_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DATE , TO_CHAR(LOGIN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LOGIN_DATE , LATEST_LOGIN_IP , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , TO_CHAR(LATEST_LOGIN_FAIL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LATEST_LOGIN_FAIL_DATE , BLOCK_YN , FILE_GROUP_ID FROM SPRING_BOOT.MEMBERS WHERE EMAIL = #{_parameter}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBERS SET LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT = LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT +1 , LATEST_LOGIN_FAIL_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE EMAIL = #{_parameter}
UPDATE MEMBERS SET BLOCK_YN = 'Y' WHERE EMAIL = #{_parameter} AND LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT >=5
